g.title: acq.funding_source:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.funding_source:currency_type->acq.currency_type:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (currency_type) REFERENCES acq.currency_type(code) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_allocation:funding_source->acq.funding_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (funding_source) REFERENCES acq.funding_source(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_allocation_percent:funding_source->acq.funding_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (funding_source) REFERENCES acq.funding_source(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.funding_source_credit:funding_source->acq.funding_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (funding_source) REFERENCES acq.funding_source(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
